steps.title: Connect cause and result
steps.content: Typha latifolia absorbs manganese and stores it safely. The following decrease in soil manganese is a result of that absorption, so the transition must show cause and effect.

steps.title: Signal the consequence
steps.content: A signals contrast, B adds a separate point, and D introduces a specific example rather than a result. The transition needs to show that the soil decrease follows from the plant's action. The answer is C.
